key_learnings: Nutritious diets can be achieved at lower cost through strategic selection of whole foods.
research_findings: Legumes, eggs, and seasonal produce provide the best nutritional value per dollar.
current_focus_areas: Integrating real-time grocery pricing APIs to generate cost-optimized meal suggestions.
